notes: Game crashes when entering any of the sexy lessons. Normal game works okay, with the cloths sometimes losing textures
title: VR Kanojo / VRカノジョ

notes: While there is stuttering in-game, if you delete or rename the ~/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/VR_Kanojo_Data/Plugins/AudioPluginOculusSpatializer.dll file, then everything will be playable from then on.
title: VR Kanojo / VRカノジョ
